videoSnippet.title: Chess Really Was Art Before Engines || Topalov vs Kasparov || Euwe Memorial (1996)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Lotus Chess April Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/nT0JRnZV
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Veselin Topalov vs Garry Kasparov
"On Topa Things" (game of the day Sep-03-2006)
Euwe Memorial (1996), Amsterdam NED, rd 1, Mar-22
Sicilian Defense: Najdorf Variation (B90)

1. e4 c5 2. Nf3 d6 3. d4 cd4 4. Nd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6 6. Bc4 e6 7. Bb3 Nbd7 8. f4 Nc5 9. O-O Nce4 10. Ne4 Ne4 11. f5 e5 12. Qh5 Qe7 13. Qf3 Nc5 14. Nc6 Qc7 15. Bd5 a5 16. Bg5 Ra6 17. Nd8 f6 18. Nf7 Rg8 19. Be3 g6 20. Ng5 Rg7 21. fg6 Rg6 22. Bf7 Qf7 23. Nf7 Kf7 24. Bc5 dc5 25. Rad1 Be7 26. Rd5 Bg4 27. Qe4 Kg7 28. Rfd1 Bd1 29. Rd1 Re6 30. Qf5 Kf7 31. Re1 b6 32. h4 Rg7 33. Kf1 Bd6 34. Kf2 Bc7 35. Kf3 Ke7 36. Re4 Kf7 37. Rg4 Re7 38. Ke4 Rg4 39. Qg4 Bd8 40. a4 Kf8 41. c3 Rg7 42. Qc8 Ke8 43. Qe6 Kf8 44. g4 Rf7 45. h5 Rg7 46. h6 Rg6 47. Qd5 Be7 48. Kf5 Rh6 49. Qb7 e4 50. Qb8 Kf7 51. Qb6 e3 52. Qe6 Ke8 53. Qe3 Rg6 54. Qe4 Rg5 55. Kf4 Kd7 56. Qb7 Ke6 57. Qc8 Kf7 58. Qc7 h5 59. gh5 Rh5 60. Qa5 Bd6 61. Ke4 f5 62. Kd5 Be7 63. Qc7 Rh6 64. a5 Rd6 65. Ke5 Rf6 66. Qc8
